data.name: multi_agent_medical_assistant
data.clientRequest: We are building a medical assistant tool that can answer complex healthcare-related questions using internal documents and structured reasoning. The system must support multi-step reasoning and ensure accurate, explainable responses.
workDone: Designed multi-agent architecture for task decomposition
Integrated knowledge base for medical data
Implemented reasoning flow for improved answer accuracy

data.name: Firmware Development for Custom PCB with NRF52840
data.clientRequest: We have a custom board built around the Nordic nRF52840 and need production-ready firmware: reliable BLE behavior, low power where possible, and clean integration with our application protocol.
workDone: Developed and debugged firmware on nRF52840 (SDK per project requirements)
Implemented BLE services, bonding, and OTA considerations
Validated power consumption and RF performance
Documented build, flash, and test procedures

data.name: AI Email Assistant for Sales Team
data.clientRequest: AI should reply to emails and categorize leads.

data.name: automatic-daily-work-report-on-Slack-using-AI
data.clientRequest: Our team spends time compiling daily reports. We want to automate report generation and delivery to Slack.

data.name: robinhood-options-trading-bot
data.clientRequest: We need a high-performance trading system that can process signals, execute trades, and notify users in real time.

data.name: email-automation-via-n8n
data.clientRequest: We need to automate email processing, extract key information, and trigger follow-up workflows without manual intervention.

data.name: Push to Talk device Over Internet
data.clientRequest: We need a dedicated push-to-talk device that works over the internet for our team: low latency voice, reliable connection handling, and hardware that fits our enclosure and UX expectations.
workDone: Defined architecture for MCU, audio path, and network stack
Implemented PTT logic, audio capture/playback, and session management
Integrated cloud or VoIP signaling for voice over IP
Prototyped PCBA, iterated firmware, and supported bring-up

data.name: simpleflow
data.clientRequest: We need a lightweight automation system to connect multiple services and streamline repetitive workflows.

data.name: appointment-scheduler
data.clientRequest: We want to automate appointment booking, reminders, and scheduling workflows.

data.name: Customer Support Chatbot for SaaS
data.clientRequest: Build chatbot to answer user questions.

data.name: Python-process-killer
data.clientRequest: We need a tool to monitor and terminate problematic processes automatically.

data.name: bep20-transactions-check
data.clientRequest: We need to analyze blockchain transactions and detect anomalies.

data.name: BEP20-wallet-safety-checker
data.clientRequest: We want to evaluate wallet safety before transactions.

data.name: Control for hydroponic farm module
data.clientRequest: Our hydroponic operation needs automated control of pumps, lighting, and nutrient dosing with logging and safe failure modes—we want a maintainable controller we can extend as we add modules.
workDone: Designed control logic for irrigation, lighting schedules, and environmental limits
Implemented firmware for sensors/actuators and interlocks
Added data logging and optional remote monitoring hooks
Supported calibration, alarms, and long-run reliability testing

data.name: AutoCAD Drawing Metadata Automation
data.clientRequest: Update title blocks across multiple drawings automatically.

data.name: Financial Report Automation
data.clientRequest: Generate monthly reports from raw data.

data.name: Electronic Engineer to modify PCB Design
data.clientRequest: We have an existing PCB that needs design changes: component updates, routing fixes, and manufacturing-ready outputs without breaking mechanical fit.
workDone: Reviewed schematics and board files against new requirements
Generated Gerbers, BOM updates, and assembly notes

data.name: Bank Statement Processing Tool
data.clientRequest: Extract expenses from bank statements.

data.name: Design of a Sensors Board
data.clientRequest: We need a custom sensor interface board: multiple channels, conditioning, protection, and a clean interface to our main MCU or bus.
workDone: Captured requirements (ranges, accuracy, connectors, power budget)
Completed schematic and PCB layout with grounding and EMC awareness
Prototyped, validated analog front-end and digital interfaces
Delivered documentation for integration and test

data.name: Bluetooth Low Energy & Gateway development
data.clientRequest: We need an IoT developer to build BLE peripherals and a gateway that aggregates data to our cloud or on-prem backend with stable pairing and security basics.
workDone: Implemented BLE GATT services and device firmware
Built or configured gateway for protocol translation
Integrated MQTT/HTTP uplink and device provisioning flow
Tested range, throughput, and reconnection behavior

data.name: ESP-smart configuration testing and prototyping
data.clientRequest: We are shipping ESP-based devices and need robust Wi-Fi provisioning (smart config / app-assisted setup), thorough testing, and prototype iterations before production.
workDone: Prototyped smart-config and fallback provisioning flows
Automated test cases across routers and failure modes
Tuned firmware for reliability and user feedback (LED/UI)
Documented factory and field setup procedures

data.name: GUI design and Interface for CT Power boards using Nextion
data.clientRequest: We need a clear operator interface on Nextion displays for our CT power hardware: screens, alarms, setpoints, and serial protocol alignment with existing firmware.
workDone: Designed Nextion HMI pages and navigation for operational workflows
Defined UART framing and command set with firmware team
Implemented validation on hardware and iteration from user feedback
Delivered project files and integration guide

data.name: Battery Requirements for Box project
data.clientRequest: We are defining a battery-powered enclosure and need help sizing chemistry, cell configuration, protection, charging, and compliance with our load profile and temperature range.
workDone: Modeled load profile and estimated runtime targets
Selected BMS/charging approach and connector strategy
Documented electrical limits, derating, and safety considerations
Supported mechanical integration and vendor DFM questions

data.name: Arduino + Website Project
data.clientRequest: We want Arduino-based hardware connected to a simple web dashboard to monitor status, change settings remotely, and visualize events over time.
workDone: Developed Arduino firmware for sensors/actuators and stable serial/IP bridge
Built backend API and lightweight web UI for control and charts
Implemented authentication basics and deployment path
Supported end-to-end testing and incremental feature rollout

data.name: Force Sensitive Resistor Activated DC Motors
data.clientRequest: We need a compact circuit and firmware where force on an FSR reliably triggers and controls DC motors with debouncing, limits, and safe current behavior.
workDone: Designed signal conditioning for FSR and threshold/hysteresis logic
Implemented motor drive with PWM or H-bridge as required
Prototyped on breadboard/PCB and tuned responsiveness
Delivered demo firmware and wiring diagram
